summary: GST Invoice Feature Testing Complete - All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Vouchers > GST Invoice subtab working, New Invoice form with CGST/SGST calculation, invoice list with PDF/WhatsApp/Edit/Delete actions, Settings tab shows GST Company Settings form.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> in GST rate dropdown - minor React hydration warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/gst-company-settings returns all expected fields (company_name, gstin, address, state_code, state_name, phone, bank_name, bank_account, bank_ifsc)
VERIFIED: PUT /api/gst-company-settings saves and persists company details correctly
VERIFIED: POST /api/gst-invoices creates invoice with correct CGST/SGST split (5% GST = 2.5% CGST + 2.5% SGST)
VERIFIED: POST /api/gst-invoices with is_igst=True calculates IGST correctly (no CGST/SGST)
VERIFIED: GET /api/gst-invoices filters by kms_year and season correctly
VERIFIED: PUT /api/gst-invoices/{id} updates invoice and recalculates totals
VERIFIED: DELETE /api/gst-invoices/{id} removes invoice from database
VERIFIED: GET /api/gst-invoices/{id}/pdf generates valid PDF (checked magic bytes %PDF)
VERIFIED: POST /api/whatsapp/send-gst-invoice endpoint exists and handles requests
VERIFIED: Frontend Vouchers tab has GST Invoice subtab with correct data-testid
VERIFIED: New Invoice form calculates totals in real-time (Taxable, CGST, SGST, Total)
VERIFIED: Invoice list shows all invoices with action buttons (PDF, WhatsApp, Edit, Delete)
VERIFIED: Settings tab has GST Invoice Company Details section with all required fields
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice TEST-UI-002 during UI testing, cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: GST Invoice feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs: /api/gst-company-settings (GET/PUT), /api/gst-invoices (CRUD), /api/gst-invoices/{id}/pdf, /api/whatsapp/send-gst-invoice. Frontend: Vouchers tab > GST Invoice subtab, Settings tab > GST Invoice Company Details section. All working correctly.

gst_company_settings_get.details: GET /api/gst-company-settings returns all expected fields with defaults

gst_company_settings_put.details: PUT /api/gst-company-settings saves and persists data correctly

gst_invoice_create_cgst_sgst.details: POST /api/gst-invoices creates invoice with correct CGST/SGST split (5% = 2.5% + 2.5%)

gst_invoice_create_igst.details: POST /api/gst-invoices with is_igst=True calculates IGST correctly

gst_invoice_list_filter.details: GET /api/gst-invoices filters by kms_year and season

gst_invoice_update.details: PUT /api/gst-invoices/{id} updates invoice and recalculates totals

whatsapp_send_gst_invoice.details: POST /api/whatsapp/send-gst-invoice endpoint exists and handles requests

frontend_vouchers_gst_tab.details: Vouchers tab > GST Invoice subtab loads correctly

frontend_new_invoice_form.details: New Invoice form opens, calculates totals in real-time, saves successfully

frontend_settings_gst_company.details: Settings tab shows GST Invoice Company Details form with all fields
